title: Managing users and teams
excerpt:

posts.author: STeveR (Steven Rieger)
posts.cookedHtml:
When editing user profiles please add the ability to select one or more teams. Right now I have to go to the Team itself and add users that way.

When adding users please refresh the view to show newly added users. Right now I have to refresh the entire page to see new users.

When adding new Teams, please refresh the view so the new team shows up on the left hand navigation. Right now I have to refresh the entire page to see any newly added teams
